title: Cobbled Paths
description: Various cobbled and paved paths for faster and aesthetic streets
body:
# Cobbled Paths

Quilt version requires: [QSL](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) and [GroovyDuvet](https://modrinth.com/mod/groovyduvet)

Forge version requires: [GML](https://modrinth.com/mod/gml)

 

Adds various cobbled and paved paths. Paths give speed boosts when walked on, depending on the material.

## Details:

Paths are created by using the appropriate sett or cobble on dirt paths, snow, soul sand, or end stone depending on the material. Certain paths can be further modified:

* Most paths can be "cracked" with a Sledgehammer
* Nether Brick Paved Paths can be dyed with Nether Wart
* Cobbled Paths can be decorated with a Moss Ball
* Blackstone Paved Paths can be gilded with a Gold Nugget

This mod also includes the spade, a tool for easily switching out base blocks for paths; simply hold the block you wish to switch to in your offhand and right click with the spade. This only works for:

* Dirt-like blocks
* Soul Sand and Soul Soil
* End Stone
* Snow Block
* Gravel

## Images:

![Various Paths](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/428/376/2022-01-25_20.png "From left to right: Cobbled Path, Stone Paved Path, Deepslate Paved Path")

From left to right: Cobbled Path, Stone Paved Path, Deepslate Paved Path

![Snowy Paths](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/428/377/2022-01-25_20.png "From left to right: Ice Paved Path, Blue Ice Paved Path")

From left to right: Ice Paved Path, Blue Ice Paved Path

![Nether Paths](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/428/722/2022-01-26_20.png "Nether Brick and Blackstone Paved Paths, alongside cracked and decorated variants")

Nether Brick and Blackstone Paved Paths, alongside cracked and decorated variants

![End Paths](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/428/792/2022-01-27_14.png "Purpur and Obsidian paths with cracked variants")

Purpur and Obsidian paths with cracked variants

## To Use:

* Craft setts or cobbles with a stonecutter
* Use them on the proper base path block (dirt paths, snow, soul sand, or end stone)
* The sledgehammer can be used to make paths cracked
* Gold nuggets can be used to decorate blackstone paths; nether wart to decorate nether brick paths; and cobble to decorate cobbled paths.
